app.title: QueryCraft
app.subtitle: Text-to-SQL Analytics Platform
auth.signIn.title: Sign In
auth.signIn.username.label: Username
auth.signIn.password.label: Password
auth.signOut.label: Sign Out
query.input.placeholder: Ask a question about your data...
query.ask.title: What would you like to know?
query.result.title: Results
query.result.empty: No results found for your query
query.accept.success.title: Success
query.accept.success.message: Query accepted and saved to history.
query.evaluator.rejected: We couldn't generate a safe query for your question. Please try rephrasing it in a different way.
query.evaluatorRejection.heading: Generated SQL was rejected for safety
query.evaluatorRejection.body: The system blocked this query because: {reason}
query.refine.message: We couldn't refine this query automatically. Please rephrase your question.
history.title: Query History
history.column.question: Question
error.unauthorized: Your session has expired or you are not signed in. Please sign in again.
error.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
error.concurrent: A query is already being processed. Please wait.
error.llmUnavailable: The AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
error.attemptInvalid: This query attempt has expired or is invalid. Please submit a new question.
error.timeout: The query timed out. Please try a simpler question.
error.unknown.title: Error
error.unknown.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.evaluator.title: Evaluator Rejected
error.evaluator.message: The generated SQL was rejected by safety rules.
error.accept.title: Error
error.validation.questionTooLong: Question must be at most {{max}} characters.
error.validation.unknown: Validation failed. Please check your input.
